name: settings routes missing Issue-901 (resolvedVia) break-tests
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-01] settings.test.ts has zero resolvedVia tests; never covers isOwner:true + resolvedVia:'auto' escalation path for 11 assertOwnerProfile/assertNotProxyMode call sites. Fix: add break tests sending resolvedVia:'auto' asserting 403 + service not called.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: settings route tests cover non-owner/proxy failures but do not cover the Issue 901 auto-resolved owner case where profileMeta is { isOwner: true, resolvedVia: auto }. Variants: all settings owner gates must reject auto-resolved owner identity, including assertOwnerProfile-only child celebration GET/PUT and assertNotProxyMode-backed settings writes. Regression test: add [BREAK][Issue 901] coverage in apps/api/src/routes/settings.test.ts, preferably table-driven over the affected call sites, asserting 403 and that the relevant service mock is not called; the tests fail if the resolvedVia guard is removed.
riskImpact: A regression re-accepting resolvedVia:'auto' in the owner gate would go undetected for all settings owner/proxy routes.
